---
name: Commercial license request
about: Request a license to use spine commercially (the default license is noncommercial)
title: "[Commercial license] "
labels: commercial-license
---

spine is source-available under **PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0** — free for any noncommercial use,
but **commercial use requires a separate license from the author**. Tell us a bit and we'll arrange one:

- **Who you are / company:**
- **How you'd use spine commercially:**
- **Scale** (users / seats / product it ships in):
- **Contact** (email or handle):
